project.name: taskflow
project.description: A lightweight task management API for small teams

core_features.name: Task CRUD
core_features.description: Create, read, update, delete tasks with assignees and due dates

core_features.name: Team workspaces
core_features.description: Isolated workspaces per team with member invites

core_features.name: Activity feed
core_features.description: Real-time feed of task changes per workspace

core_features.name: Webhook notifications
core_features.description: Fire webhooks on task state changes for integrations

phase2.magic_moment: The moment a developer calls POST /tasks and gets a structured response they can immediately render in their app
phase2.interview_summary: TaskFlow is a clean REST API for team task management, built with FastAPI and PostgreSQL. The developer wants a production-ready but lean API that can be self-hosted. The main challenge is designing a clean workspace isolation model that scales to multiple teams without over-engineering.
